title: Tinospora esiangkara
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Tinospora esiangkara.
uses: Tinospora esiangkara, a plant native to certain regions of Asia, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. Its extracts have been studied for their anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Traditional healers have used the plant to treat various conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
